title: CP9 Drops the Disguise
description: Rob Lucci, Kaku, Kalifa, and Blueno are exposed as World Government agents, turning trusted Water Seven figures into enemies.
scene: Across pages 9, 10, 11, 12, this part follows Iceburg, Nico Robin, Paulie, Blueno, Kaku. Rob Lucci, Kaku, Kalifa, and Blueno are exposed as World Government agents, turning trusted Water Seven figures into enemies.

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: They shouldn't be able to get in...

dialogue.speaker: Blueno
dialogue.text: There shouldn't be a door there...

dialogue.speaker: Paulie
dialogue.text: I can go through any door freely.

dialogue.speaker: Paulie
dialogue.text: We didn't get the signal yet.

dialogue.speaker: Paulie
dialogue.text: You seem to know a lot.

dialogue.speaker: Rob Lucci
dialogue.text: It's all... part of your plan....?

summary: Rob Lucci, Kaku, Kalifa, and Blueno are exposed as World Government agents, turning trusted Water Seven figures into enemies.
